# RTI Canteen

> Online canteen and restaurant management system for the Railway Training Institute. Order meals, reserve tables, and browse the daily menu.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of the canteen, daily specials, and quick actions for ordering and reservations.
- [Menu](/menu): Browse available meals, drinks, and daily specials with prices and descriptions.
- [Reservations](/reservations): Book a table in advance for dining at the Railway Training Institute canteen.

## Blog

- [Benefits of Canteen Management Systems](/blog/benefits-of-canteen-management-systems): A complete guide on how automation improves efficiency, reduces food waste, and streamlines payments in institutional dining settings.
